chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT LARKANA Constt. Petition No. S- 24 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge For non-prosecution. 17.07.2025. Mr. Munawar Ali Abbasi, Assistant Advocate General, Sindh. ------------ None present for the petitioner. No intimation is received. This Constitutional Petition has been filed for issuance of Rule Nisi for the recovery of detainee Mst. Saeeda wife of the Petitioner. Record reflects that this petition was filed on 30.01.2025, thereafter Petitioner and his Counsel did not bother to deposit cost or pursue this matter which prima facie suggests that either the grievance of the petitioners has been served or the Petitioner has lost interest in the matter. Accordingly, this petition is dismissed for non-prosecution. J U D G E S.Ashfaq
